hypothesis_en: Mr President, Mr Watson, I am sure that the Presidency will ensure that all groups can exercise their full rights.
reference_en: thank you very much indeed obviously the (1.29) Presidency will make sure that all groups can make sure can enjoy their rights in full
source_es: muchas gracias Señor Watson tenga la seguridad de que la Presidencia velará para que todos los grupos puedan ejercer la plenitud de sus derechos tiene la palabra la Señora Frassoni
